title: canarium subulatum
intro: Canarium subulatum, also known as the Wild Canarium or Canarium tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in India, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Canarium subulatum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including oils, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
